prompt:
A handheld EC meter with a slender body and detachable probe cap lies next to a small container of nutrient solution, its tip dipped into the liquid. The screen shows a numeric value and unit indicator, but the text is too small to read, implying a 0–2000 ppm range without giving exact numbers. The meter’s controls are minimal and unbranded, and a hydroponic tub with healthy plants is visible in the background, clearly tying the reading to nutrient strength monitoring.

The scene is a near-future solarpunk grow area with soft, even lighting, tidy tubing and cables, and organized bottles of nutrients in the blurred background. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization, no logos or legible text on the meter or containers, and a composition that centers the EC meter, its probe, and the sample cup while the rest of the hydroponic setup remains softly out of focus, emphasizing practical, routine measurement.
